items.title: Type-check, lint, and production build all pass
items.expected: All three exit 0 with no errors from the new EmailLogs files
items.evidence: tsc exit 0; eslint exit 0; vite build exit 0 (built in 8.06s). Chunk-size warning is pre-existing and app-wide.

items.title: Heading matches the sibling dashboard (AdminPageHeader + Mail icon)
items.precondition: Logged in as admin; navigate to /admin/email-logs
items.expected: Navy rounded icon tile with a Mail glyph, bold title, gray description, and a slide-up entrance — same treatment as Application Logs
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.

items.title: Category and Status filters are animated dropdowns
steps: 2. Observe the dropdown open with a chevron rotation and fade
3. Pick a value; repeat for Status
items.expected: AnimatedSelect opens/closes with motion; selecting a value filters the list and resets to page 1
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.

items.title: Date and search inputs have brand focus ring; Reset clears filters
steps: 1. Focus the From, To, and Search inputs
2. Apply any filter, then click Reset
items.expected: Focused inputs show the orange focus ring; a Reset button appears only when a filter is active and clears all filters back to defaults
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.

items.title: Table rows animate in and highlight on hover
items.precondition: On /admin/email-logs with at least one logged email
steps: 1. Load the page and watch the rows
items.expected: Rows stagger in (fade + slide); hovering tints the row; header uses the parchment tint
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.

items.title: Loading skeleton and empty/error states render
steps: 1. Reload and observe the initial load
2. Apply a filter that matches nothing
items.expected: Initial load shows pulsing skeleton rows; a no-match filter shows the EmptyState with an Inbox icon and a Reset CTA
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.

items.title: Detail modal animates and the email body renders sandboxed
items.precondition: On /admin/email-logs with at least one logged email
steps: 2. Read the metadata and the rendered email preview
3. Close via the X, the backdrop, and the Escape key
items.expected: Modal springs in over a blurred backdrop; metadata + badges show; the HTML body renders inside the sandboxed iframe; all three close methods work with an exit animation
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.

items.title: No double padding; list + detail behavior unchanged
steps: 1. Compare page gutters against other admin pages
2. Exercise pagination Prev/Next and confirm the same rows as before the change
items.expected: Single consistent page padding (no 48px gutter); pagination and filtering return identical results to the pre-polish page
items.evidence: Owner-verified 2026-07-08 in own authenticated admin tab.
